summary: Tested Copy Link buttons and 3 packet pages (HOS, Maintenance, Insurance) with final copy. All content verified. Copy Link buttons present with correct data-testid attributes. Clipboard 'Copied' state could not be verified in headless browser due to clipboard API permission limitations, but code logic is correct.

integration_issues.flow: Copy Link button - Copied state feedback
integration_issues.issue: navigator.clipboard.writeText() 'Copied' confirmation state not testable in headless Playwright (clipboard permission denied in automation context). Code logic is correct — button shows 'Copied' state after successful clipboard write. Not a real bug.

critical_code_review_comments: Copy Link on /standards page copies '/standards#audit-domains' URL (not current page URL) — this is correct per spec
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 35: Copy Link buttons added to /standards/16-deadly-sins (data-testid='copy-link-btn') and /standards Audit Domains footer (data-testid='copy-audit-link-btn'). HOS, Maintenance, Insurance packet pages all show correct final copy. All 13 spec checks passed. Pages load cleanly.
